summary: AI Character Memory Sprint C testing complete. 29/29 backend tests passed (100%). All Sprint C features verified: Editable VB (versioning/archiving/validation/style_lock protection), Relationship Graph (bidirectional, enriched), Emotional Arc (categorical model, trend), Library Search/Filter (name search, role filter, sort). Frontend UI verified: Character Library has search input, role filter chips, sort dropdown. Character Detail shows VB version (v6), Edit button, impact warning, Save & Validate button, Relationships zone with Zara badge, Continuity score (100 avg across 11 checks).

issues: Relationship type badge shows 'unknown' - this is because test changed the type via invalid_relationship_type test. Expected behavior.

critical_code_review_comments: characters.py 1277-1283: EDITABLE_VB_FIELDS and LOCKED_VB_FIELDS properly define which fields can be edited vs protected
characters.py 1300-1383: edit_visual_bible properly bumps version, archives to character_visual_bible_history, auto-validates continuity
characters.py 1325-1332: style_lock protection requires style_reset=true flag - working correctly
characters.py 1339-1343: Safety re-check on canonical_description change prevents IP violations in edits
characters.py 1414-1499: Relationship graph creates bidirectional A->B and B->A entries, enriches with names/portraits
characters.py 1506-1577: Emotional arc derives emotion/intensity/trend from character_memory_logs
characters.py 1584-1621: Search/filter with regex name search, role filter, sort by name/created_at/updated_at
CharacterDetail.js: Edit VB inline editor shows impact warning, Save & Validate button triggers PATCH visual-bible
CharacterDetail.js: Relationships zone shows friend/enemy badges with relationship_type/state
CharacterLibrary.js: Search input, ROLE_FILTERS chips, sortBy dropdown all functional

test_credentials.finn_character_id: d8cf0208-ff0c-4c21-8725-ffa6326d8da9 (fox hero, VB v6 after tests)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing Finn and Zara characters
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint C features fully tested. Finn's VB is now at v6 (multiple edits during testing). Relationship between Finn/Zara exists but type was changed to 'unknown' during invalid_relationship_type test. Emotional arc shows 0 entries because no episodes have been generated with character memory write. Search/filter endpoint is at /api/characters/search/query. All 29 backend tests pass and frontend UI verified working.

PATCH_visual_bible_edits_and_bumps_versi.evidence: Edited clothing_description, version bumped correctly, continuity_check returned in response

PATCH_visual_bible_blocks_style_lock_wit.evidence: Returns 422 with error='style_lock_protected' when changing style_lock without style_reset=true

PATCH_visual_bible_allows_style_lock_wit.evidence: Successfully changed style_lock when style_reset=true was provided

PATCH_visual_bible_safety_check_on_canon.evidence: Changing canonical_description to 'looks like Spider-Man' returns 422 safety_block

GET_visual_bible_history_returns_version.evidence: Returns current_version, history array with archived snapshots, total_versions

POST_relationships_bidirectional.evidence: Creating Finn->Zara relationship also creates Zara->Finn reverse relationship

GET_relationships_enriched.evidence: Returns relationships with related_name, related_portrait_url, related_species, related_role

GET_emotional_arc_returns_structure.evidence: Returns arc, total_entries, trend, current_emotion, current_intensity

GET_search_filter_by_role.evidence: Filter role='sidekick' returns only sidekick characters

GET_search_sort_by_name.evidence: Sort by name returns alphabetically sorted results

UI_character_library_sort_dropdown.evidence: data-testid='sort-select' exists with Last used/Created/Name options

UI_character_detail_edit_vb_button.evidence: data-testid='edit-vb-btn' exists and opens inline editor

UI_character_detail_impact_warning.evidence: Editor shows 'Changes may affect consistency across previous episodes. Version will be bumped.'

UI_character_detail_emotional_arc_zone.evidence: Zone not visible (0 entries) - expected behavior since no episodes generated
